title: polystichum pallidum
intro: Polystichum pallidum, also known as the pale lady fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory abilities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polystichum pallidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and support skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
